message.content:
@startuml
actor "Organization Employee" as OE

participant ":CreateTaskUI" as UI
participant ":CreateTaskController" as Controller
participant "ApplicationPOT" as AppPOT
participant "app\n:ApplicationPOT" as App
participant "session\n:UserSession" as Session
participant ":Platform" as Platform
participant "org\n:Organization" as Org
participant "task\n:Task" as Task
participant "cat\n:Category" as Cat
participant "lc\n:List<Category>" as LC

OE -> UI : 1 asks to create a new task
UI -> OE : 2 requests data (reference, designation, informal\ndescription, technical description, duration, cost)
OE -> UI : 3 types requested data
UI -> Controller : 4 lc=getTaskCategories()
Controller -> AppPOT : 5 lc=getTaskCategories()
AppPOT --> LC : 
AppPOT --> Controller : 
Controller --> UI : 
UI -> OE : 6 shows task categories list and ask to select one
OE -> UI : 7 selects a task category
UI -> Controller : 8 createTask(ref,designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,categoryId)
Controller -> AppPOT : 9 cat=getCategoryById(categoryId)
AppPOT --> Cat :
AppPOT --> Controller :
Controller -> App : 10 app = getInstance()
App --> Controller :
Controller -> Session : 11 session = getCurrentSession()
Session --> Controller :
Controller -> Session : 12 email = getUserEmail()
Session --> Controller :
Controller -> Platform : 13 org = getOrganizationByUserEmail(email)
Platform --> Controller :
Controller -> Org : 14 task=createTask(ref,designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,cat)
Org -> Task : 15 create(ref,designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,cat)
Org -> Task : 16 validateTask(task)
Task --> Org :
Org --> Controller : 17 result
Controller --> UI : 
UI -> OE : 18 shows all data and requests confirmation
OE -> UI : 19 confirms the data
UI -> Controller : 20 saveTask()
Controller -> Org : 21 saveTask(task)
Org -> Task : 22 validateTask(task)
Task --> Org :
Org -> Task : 23 addTask(task)
Org --> Controller : 24 result
Controller --> UI :
UI -> OE : 25 informs operation success

@enduml
